emails.subject: Letter to residential customers
emails.body: Letter to residential customers Attached is a draft of the letter we'd like to send to our 16,000 residential customers on Friday. Please review and let me know your comments by 12 noon on Wednesday.

emails.subject: Re: Letter to residential customers
emails.body: Re: Letter to residential customers Is there anything we can tell them about the rates they should expect from the utility? I think that will be the biggest concern and we can reduce backlash if we can provide them some information. Peggy Mahoney@EES 05/22/2001 06:37 PM
